children.text: Click a service for its settings
Vibrate the device when a new message is received.
Enabling this will brighten your screen whenever a new notification is received.
Vibrate and/or ring your device when you are using Disa and you receive a new message.
Enabling this makes notifications repeat every 10 minutes after the initial notification was dismissed.
To begin, click Add Service and select a service that you want to setup.
